task_context: Nodes cn010-cn015 (6 nodes) all show simultaneous power spikes to 950W at 09:00 UTC. All 6 nodes are running jobs from job array 1048200[1-6]. Power draw before: ~320W each. Duration so far: 15 minutes.
task_question: Explain the energy anomaly across nodes cn010-cn015.
agent_response: The simultaneous power spike across all 6 nodes running the same job array strongly suggests the jobs entered a synchronized compute-intensive phase. The 950W vs 320W baseline (nearly 3× increase) indicates these tasks are now running at maximum CPU capacity. The correlation with job array start time suggests the jobs all started the same phase simultaneously. This may be expected behavior or could indicate suboptimal job scheduling creating power demand peaks.
